generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in the crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModelFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics and trajectory execution validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance DarTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for system evolution in digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance CapellaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella model for Model-Based Systems Engineering in teaching contexts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, MQTTBrokerService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database for storing historical crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for creating operator dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module implementing Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, and Physical Crane Interface services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, PhysicalCraneInterfaceService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory execution and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationConfidenceBoundsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationThresholdAlertAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorageInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes trajectory traces and simulation confidence bounds using Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates inter-service communication via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageTransmissionAction
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls physical crane components via motor controllers and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorControlAction, ElectromagnetControlAction
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path for crane movement to move containers between locations"
]

instance SimulationConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confidence bounds of simulation results for trajectory validation"
]

instance ValidationThresholdAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers operator notification when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored historical sensor data in TimescaleDB for analysis"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces and simulation confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard"
]

instance MessageTransmissionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmits messages between Trajectory Generator and Control Application"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls stepper motors for cart and hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ElectromagnetControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activates or deactivates electromagnet for container pickup"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller for cart and hoist stepper motors"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at the crane's end-effector"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller interfacing with sensors and electromagnet"
]

instance PhysicalCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance DatabaseContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for TimescaleDB database"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker"
]

instance DashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for Grafana dashboard visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python module for trajectory generation within gantrylib"
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python module for simulation service within gantrylib"
]

instance ContinuousValidationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python module for continuous validation service within gantrylib"
]

instance DockerEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Docker-based environment for containerized services"
    base:contains DatabaseContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer, DashboardContainer
]

instance PCEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Personal computer environment for non-containerized services"
    base:contains TrajectoryGeneratorContainer, SimulationServiceContainer, ContinuousValidationContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends movement commands (e.g., optimal trajectories from the Trajectory Generator Service) to the Physical Crane Interface, which controls motor movements and electromagnet operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logged and validated during operation; the Continuous Validation Service performs immediate comparison of executed trajectories against simulations without fixed intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated as a centralized system where physical crane components interact with digital services via MQTT and database; C4 model shows physical crane, interface, control application, logging, HMI, and digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) working together."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), as manufactured (physical hardware), and as operated (real-time data logging and validation during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real measurements and simulations, comparing against thresholds; model validation techniques from [5] are reused to ensure fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time communication between services, with TimescaleDB using SQL for data storage and retrieval."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer using Docker containerization for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; repository available on GitHub for public access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc approach without adherence to formal digital twin frameworks; uses general open-source technologies (Docker, PostgreSQL, Grafana) but does not follow industry-specific standards for digital twin engineering."
]
